title: Heart Transplant Recipient With Demyelinating Polyneuropathy and Allograft Rejection
description: A 58-year-old heart-transplant recipient with prior cryptococcal meningitis developed progressive weakness, gait instability, and bulbar symptoms; CSF and electrodiagnostic testing supported demyelinating polyneuropathy, and a later readmission revealed pAMR2 cardiac allograft rejection. This case stresses multistage reasoning and a verified fluconazole-cyclosporine interaction from the AGBonnet augmented-clinical-notes dataset (idx 74918; conversation and full_note columns).
notes: Derived from dataset row idx 74918. The original dataset row is copied into case_06_source.json. All patient data comes from the synthetic augmented-clinical-notes dataset.
